methods.name: Initialize(Dynamo.Scheduler.IScheduler)
methods.summary: DynamoScheduler calls this method to initialize and start this instance of scheduler thread. This call marks the point from which it is safe to call into DynamoScheduler.

params.name: owningScheduler
params.doc: A reference to the DynamoScheduler object which owns this instance of scheduler thread.

methods.name: Shutdown
methods.summary: DynamoScheduler calls this method to shutdown the scheduler thread.
